Title: Pair of Vintage Ethnic Cultural Dolls
Description: Two decorative porcelain dolls dressed in traditional Eastern European or Indigenous-inspired clothing with detailed embroidered designs, beaded accents, and ornate headpieces. The dolls feature painted faces with expressive features and are dressed in dark brown fabric adorned with golden trim and colorful beading. Both dolls are in good condition with intact clothing and accessories.

Title: Decorative Santa Claus Figure with Sleigh
Description: A festive holiday decorative Santa figure dressed in red velvet with fur trim, holding a gold gift and riding in a blue sleigh. The piece features detailed craftsmanship with a white fur beard, green wreath on his hat, and decorative bells on the sleigh runners. Perfect for holiday display and seasonal home décor.

Title: Vintage Porcelain Lady Figurine with Pink Parasol
Description: A charming vintage porcelain figurine depicting a young woman in Victorian-style clothing. She wears a pink jacket with navy blue trim, cream-colored undergarments, and a quilted pink skirt. The figure has reddish-brown hair, fair complexion, and is holding a pink parasol. She also holds what appears to be a small red apple or fruit in her other hand. A delicate blue and gold choker adorns her neck. The figurine shows excellent detail work typical of fine porcelain collectibles from the mid-20th century.
